Class JasperTextExporter

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.jasper.base.export.AbstractJasperExporter
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.jasper.base.export.JasperTextExporter
All Implemented Interfaces:
JasperIExporter, JasperITextExporter, Serializable
public class JasperTextExporter extends AbstractJasperExporter implements JasperITextExporter

JasperTextExporter class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
